content.en:
Seeing that the Qingfeng Holy Lord had agreed to his request, the Weeping Blood Emperor immediately smiled very happily.

For him, it was just a small task, and it could be done easily.

Once this is done, he will be able to obtain the Thousand Blood Lotus and Phoenix Blood Soul Fruit that he has always dreamed of.

In the past, he tried to trade with the Blue Blade Holy Lord, but unfortunately the Blue Blade Holy Lord didn't have it, because the Thousand Blood Treasure Lotus and the Phoenix Blood Soul Fruit were indeed very rare, and it was almost impossible for the outside world to find them, and he couldn't get the treasures that the Blue Blade Holy Lord needed.

Therefore, he had never obtained these two treasures from the Blue Blade Holy Lord.

"Then let's go to the Xuanxu Holy Realm!"

The Weeping Blood Emperor muttered.

Immediately, he took out a treasure - Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaves!

This is a relatively rare treasure, which can make people shuttle through the void at an extremely terrifying speed, but because it is a one-time consumable treasure, its value is not too great, and an ordinary holy relic can basically be exchanged for ten such Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaves.

Therefore, he is not distressed.

Immediately, the Weeping Blood Emperor urged the Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaves.

Rumble!!!!

The Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaves turned into a cloud of light and enveloped the Weeping Blood Emperor, and in an instant, the Weeping Blood Emperor shuttled through the Endless Void, and in the blink of an eye, he crossed the Dark Sanctuary, and then passed through the Forbidden River, flying towards the Daoshan Realm.

At the speed of the Weeping Blood Emperor, if it remained the same, it would take a few days at most to reach the Dao Mountain Realm.

However, a few hours later, the power of the Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaves was exhausted.

So, the Weeping Blood Emperor replaced it with a Ten Thousand Sky Star, and then continued to move forward.

In this way, one after another Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaves were consumed, and if they were other domain ancestors, they were afraid that they would die of distress, but the Weeping Blood Emperor was not distressed at all.

He also wanted to rush to the Daoshan Realm as soon as possible, and the Qingfeng Holy Lord also told him the detailed situation, in case he was a step too late and caused the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor to fall, then he would go in vain, and he would not want to get the Thousand Blood Treasure Lotus and the Phoenix Blood Soul Fruit.

Therefore, no matter how much Wankong Star Leaf is wasted, it doesn't matter.

For him, the Thousand Blood Treasure Lotus was worth more than ten ordinary holy relics, and even far more than ten holy relics.

In the blink of an eye, three days passed.

this day.

The Weeping Blood Emperor arrived at the Daoshan Realm.

"This realm is extraordinary, even better than several large realms I've been to!"

The Weeping Blood Emperor muttered.

He didn't waste time, and shuttled to the Xuanxu Saint Realm as fast as he could.

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian was still fighting with those two Invincible Domain Ancestors, and at this moment, these two Invincible Domain Ancestors had been seriously injured, but they still hadn't fallen.

I have to say that the Invincible Domain Ancestor is too difficult to kill, even if he is much stronger than the combat power of these two Invincible Domain Ancestors, it will take a lot of time to kill these two Invincible Domain Ancestors.

Therefore, he had to kill these two Invincible Domain Ancestors.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's expression changed drastically, and he sensed the arrival of a terrifying aura.

As the master of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, Ye Tian's sensing range was not limited to the Xuanxu Saint Realm, after all, the entire Dao Mountain Realm was transformed under the action of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, so Ye Tian was able to sense some situations in the Dao Mountain Realm.

What's more, this strong man has no concealment of his aura, and he is very close to the Xuanxu Saint Realm, Ye Tian can't do it if he doesn't want to sense it!

"Invincible Domain Ancestor, and far surpassing the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Immortal Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

Such an invincible domain ancestor, even he can't beat it!

He also had some understanding of the division of the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

He estimated that his strength could only be regarded as a top-notch four-step invincible domain ancestor at most, this was still the combat power that he only had with the blessing of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, if he didn't use the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he would be a six-step invincible domain ancestor at most.

The one who came was definitely more than a four-step invincible domain ancestor, and I am afraid that he had the strength of a three-step invincible domain ancestor.

"According to the situation of the copying talent exploration, the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor should be from the Qingyuan Holy Land, could it be the three-step invincible domain ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Still, he wasn't sure.

Tear !!!

The world barrier of the Xuanxu Saint Realm was torn apart like paper paste by a blood-colored figure.

And that blood-colored figure instantly locked the battlefield between Ye Tian and the two invincible domain ancestors, and stepped over and descended to this area.

The moment the Weeping Blood Emperor appeared, one by one the strongest domain ancestors almost rose.

"It's not good, it's the Weeping Blood Emperor!"

"Weeping Blood Emperor, how did he get here?"

"It's over, the Weeping Blood Emperor won't kill us, will he?"

For a moment, everyone was terrified.

Even the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate was very nervous.

If it was the invincible domain ancestor of other forces, he would not dare to make a move against them, but the weeping blood emperor was different, this invincible domain ancestor was a two-step invincible domain ancestor, and the clone was also a three-step invincible domain ancestor, I don't know how many disciples of the great forces had been killed, and many disciples of the Holy Gate had also fallen into his hands.

Therefore, the Weeping Blood Emperor was not afraid of their identities at all, unless they were the disciples of the Ancestors, the Weeping Blood Emperor might be afraid and would not dare to make a move.

After all, if the Ancestor killed a person, even an invincible Domain Ancestor like the Weeping Blood Emperor would definitely die, and there was no way to escape, and there was no way to hide, unless he really completely abandoned the Dark Sacred Domain and escaped into the remote area of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

In this way, it will not be easy for the Ancestors to find him.

really offended the ancestor, and it is estimated that he was intercepted before he escaped from the Dark Sanctuary.

The Qingyu Domain Ancestor was not a disciple of the Ancestor, so she was not qualified to make the Weeping Blood Emperor jealous.

At this time, the Weeping Blood Emperor did not look at the Qingyu Domain Ancestor at all, but looked at Ye Tian.

"One Supreme Domain Ancestor actually crushed two five-step invincible domain ancestors, it's interesting!"

The Weeping Blood Emperor had a strong interest in Ye Tian, and he also became jealous.

If he had a talent like Ye Tian, where would he be afraid of the Superior Domain Ancestor!

"Complete the mission first!"

When the Weeping Blood Emperor made a move, he was going to tear apart Ye Tian's Five Elements Seal, so as to rescue the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor.

The Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor and the Mili Domain Ancestor were also a little confused, looking at the posture of the Weeping Blood Emperor, it seemed that they wanted to save them!

But they don't know the Weeping Blood Emperor!

"Could it be that the Holy Lord asked the Weeping Blood Emperor to make a move?"

This idea arose in the hearts of the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestors and the Mi Li Domain Ancestors.

For a moment, they were excited.

If the Weeping Blood Emperor is born, they will definitely be able to be rescued!

The ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, no matter how against the sky, there is no way to resist the Weeping Blood Emperor!

However.

At this moment, a figure stopped the Weeping Blood Emperor.

"Weeping Blood Emperor, what are you doing here?"

Seeing this figure, the Weeping Blood Emperor's expression changed greatly.

"Ancient Sea Ancestor, why are you?"

The Weeping Blood Emperor said incredulously.

The Ancient Sea Ancestor is an invincible domain ancestor of the Battle Gate, known as one of the thirty-six War Emperors of the Battle Gate.

What is the Thirty-Six War Emperors, that is the top thirty-six Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate, each of them is no less powerful than the Two-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor, and their strength is even stronger than the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor has a great reputation, but in fact, it is only a three-step invincible domain ancestor, and his status in the battle gate is not high, but he is often responsible for some small things in the battle gate, so he has a high recognition in the battle gate.

The Ancient Sea Ancestors, on the other hand, are rarely known and are often in retreat or outside world training.

Anyway, the Ancient Sea Ancestor shouldn't have come here!
